Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 619 upvotes, 137 comments
  2. Kagi Small Web 311 upvotes, 66 comments
  3. Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language 882 upvotes, 216 comments
  4. The unlikely story of Teardown Multiplayer 143 upvotes, 29 comments
  5. Claude Tips for 3D Work 134 upvotes, 29 comments
  6. Gummy Geometry 27 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Sci-Fi Short Film “There Is No Antimemetics Division” [video] 150 upvotes, 36 comments
  8. Building a Shell 75 upvotes, 16 comments
  9. Pyodide: a Python distribution based on WebAssembly 117 upvotes, 29 comments
  10. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025) 391 upvotes, 119 comments
  11. Reddit User Uncovers Who Is Behind Meta's $2B Lobbying for Age Verification Tech 397 upvotes, 133 comments
  12. Enabling Efficient Sparse Computations Using Linear Algebra Aware Compilers 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 465 upvotes, 196 comments
  14. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 463 upvotes, 202 comments
  15. Font Smuggler – copy hidden brand fonts into Google Docs 41 upvotes, 11 comments
  16. Reverse-engineering Viktor and making it Open Source 62 upvotes, 21 comments
  17. Why I love FreeBSD 464 upvotes, 226 comments
  18. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 630 upvotes, 350 comments
  19. Fatal Core Dump Game 17 upvotes, 4 comments
  20. Every layer of review makes you 10x slower 345 upvotes, 195 comments
  21. Show HN: Oxyde – Pydantic-native async ORM with a Rust core 128 upvotes, 66 comments
  22. What CI looks like at a 100-person team (PostHog) 47 upvotes, 20 comments
  23. Gitana 18: the new flying Ultim trimaran 52 upvotes, 27 comments
  24. Silicon Valley's "Pronatalists" Killed WFH. The Strait of Hormuz Brought It Back 24 upvotes, 10 comments
  25. Starlink Mini as a failover 284 upvotes, 208 comments
  26. The American Healthcare Conundrum 402 upvotes, 377 comments
  27. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 32 upvotes, 24 comments
  28. A proposal to classify happiness as a psychiatric disorder 6 upvotes, 3 comments
  29. AirPods Max 2 298 upvotes, 490 comments
  30. Beyond has dropped “meat” from its name and expanded its high-protein drink line 156 upvotes, 377 comments

Last generated 9:30pm, 17 March 2026. Source here.
